title: init_db() runs on every request via before_request
evidence: app.py:49-52 before_request calls init_db() (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS) on every HTTP request instead of once at startup
suggestion: Call init_db() once at import/startup and drop the before_request hook to avoid a redundant DDL round-trip per request

title: App runs with debug=True and binds 0.0.0.0
suggestion: Disable debug mode and bind to localhost for anything beyond local development

title: No dependency manifest (requirements.txt / pyproject.toml)
evidence: README.md:11 instructs `pip install flask` but no requirements.txt or pyproject.toml exists in the run dir
suggestion: Add a pinned requirements.txt so the environment is reproducible

title: Dead config assignment in test fixture
evidence: test_app.py:30 sets app.config["BOOK_DB_PATH"] which is never read; DB isolation actually works via app_module.DB_PATH on the next line
suggestion: Remove the unused app.config assignment to avoid implying it drives DB path selection

title: BDD prompt fully realized with 19 Given-When-Then scenarios
evidence: test_app.py defines 6 Feature classes (TestHealthCheck..TestDeleteBook) with 19 GWT-docstring scenarios exercising only the HTTP/JSON surface; far exceeds the >=3-test minimum (R12)
suggestion: None — this satisfies the BDD prompt factor beyond the task's baseline
